all.en: This summary outlines the distributor agreement between the manufacturer and the partner.
all.zh: 本摘要概述製造商與經銷商之間的經銷協議。

all.en: The agreement grants exclusive distribution rights within a defined territory.
all.zh: 本協議授予於指定區域內的獨家經銷權。

all.en: The territory covers Southeast Asia, excluding Singapore and Malaysia.
all.zh: 該區域涵蓋東南亞，但不含新加坡與馬來西亞。

all.en: The initial term of the agreement is set at three years.
all.zh: 協議初始期限訂為三年。

all.en: Renewal is automatic for additional two year periods unless terminated.
all.zh: 除非終止，否則每兩年自動續約。

all.en: Either party may terminate with one hundred twenty days written notice.
all.zh: 任一方均可提前一百二十天以書面通知終止合約。

all.en: The distributor agrees to meet annual minimum purchase commitments.
all.zh: 經銷商同意達成年度最低採購承諾。

all.en: Year one commitment is set at two million dollars in net sales.
all.zh: 第一年承諾為淨銷售額兩百萬美元。

all.en: Commitments grow by twenty percent each subsequent year.
all.zh: 承諾金額於後續每年成長百分之二十。

all.en: Pricing is provided through a published wholesale price list.
all.zh: 定價透過公佈的批發價目表提供。

all.en: Volume discounts apply once quarterly thresholds are exceeded.
all.zh: 達成季度門檻後可適用量大折扣。

all.en: The distributor is responsible for local marketing and promotional activities.
all.zh: 經銷商負責當地的行銷與促銷活動。

all.en: Co marketing funds are available based on quarterly performance.
all.zh: 共同行銷基金依季度表現提供。

all.en: Brand guidelines must be followed in all marketing materials.
all.zh: 所有行銷素材均需遵循品牌準則。

all.en: Use of the manufacturer trademarks requires prior written approval.
all.zh: 使用製造商商標需事先取得書面同意。

all.en: The distributor must maintain certified technical staff at all times.
all.zh: 經銷商需隨時維持具認證的技術人員。

all.en: Training programs are offered twice per year at the regional office.
all.zh: 訓練課程每年於區域辦公室舉辦兩次。

all.en: Warranty claims are processed through the manufacturer support portal.
all.zh: 保固索賠透過製造商支援入口網站處理。

all.en: Confidential information must be protected during and after the term.
all.zh: 保密資訊於合約期間及之後均須受保護。

all.en: Dispute resolution begins with good faith negotiation between leaders.
all.zh: 爭議解決自雙方領導者之間的誠信協商開始。

all.en: Unresolved disputes proceed to arbitration in a neutral jurisdiction.
all.zh: 未解決的爭議將提交中立法域進行仲裁。

all.en: Termination clauses cover material breach and insolvency events.
all.zh: 終止條款涵蓋重大違約與破產事件。

all.en: Inventory buyback terms apply if the agreement is terminated for cause.
all.zh: 若協議因故終止，將適用庫存回購條款。

all.en: Both parties will review performance annually and adjust as needed.
all.zh: 雙方將每年檢視表現並依需要調整。
